heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about using timeouts with the Node.js driver, see the following
API documentation:

- [MongoClient](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html)

- [timeoutMS](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html#timeoutMS)

- [ClientSession](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/ClientSession.html)
